basics.description: **Note:** Please refer to the following before installing the solution: • Review the solution [Release Notes](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/tree/master/Solutions/BitSight%20Risk%20Findings%20CCF/ReleaseNotes.md) • There may be [known issues](https://aka.ms/sentinelsolutionsknownissues) pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing. The **BitSight Risk Findings CCF** solution ingests normalized WARN and BAD BitSight risk-vector findings for a selected portfolio company into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework (RestApiPoller). It includes hunting queries and an analytic rule for monitoring the selected BitSight risk vectors. **Data Connectors:** 1, **Analytic Rules:** 1, **Hunting Queries:** 5 [Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel](https://aka.ms/azuresentinel) | [Learn more about Solutions](https://aka.ms/azuresentinelsolutionsdoc)

metadata.hidden: Hiding location, we get it from the log analytics workspace

basics.name: getLAWorkspace
basics.toolTip: This filters by workspaces that exist in the Resource Group selected

basics.name: workspace
basics.label: Workspace
basics.toolTip: This dropdown will list only workspace that exists in the Resource Group selected

options.text: This Solution installs the data connector for Bitsight Risk Findings (via Codeless Connector Framework). You can get Bitsight Risk Findings (via Codeless Connector Framework) data in your Microsoft Sentinel workspace. After installing the solution, configure and enable this data connector by following guidance in Manage solution view.

link.label: Learn more about connecting data sources

options.text: This solution installs the following analytic rule templates. After installing the solution, create and enable analytic rules in Manage solution view.

elements.name: analytic1
elements.label: New BAD BitSight risk findings observed

options.text:
Identifies newly observed BAD BitSight risk findings for the monitored reduced-scope
risk vectors. The rule searches for BAD findings ingested in the last hour that were
not previously observed in the prior 14 days.
This solution installs the following hunting queries. After installing the solution, run these hunting queries to hunt for threats in Manage solution view.

elements.name: huntingquery1
elements.label: Latest WARN and BAD BitSight findings

options.text: Returns the most recent WARN and BAD BitSight findings across all monitored companies. This hunting query depends on BitSight data connector (BitsightRiskFindings_CL Parser or Table)

elements.name: huntingquery2
elements.label: Active BAD BitSight findings by company

options.text:
Finds the latest active BAD BitSight findings summarized by company to
help analysts identify organizations with the highest concentration of
active risk findings. This hunting query depends on BitSight data connector (BitsightRiskFindings_CL Parser or Table)

elements.name: huntingquery3
elements.label: BitSight finding trend by risk vector

options.text: Trends WARN and BAD BitSight findings by company and risk vector over time. This hunting query depends on BitSight data connector (BitsightRiskFindings_CL Parser or Table)

elements.name: huntingquery4
elements.label: Newly observed BAD BitSight findings in the last 24 hours

options.text: Returns BAD BitSight findings first seen in Microsoft Sentinel during the last 24 hours. This hunting query depends on BitSight data connector (BitsightRiskFindings_CL Parser or Table)

elements.name: huntingquery5
elements.label: Company risk posture summary from BitSight findings

options.text: Summarizes WARN and BAD findings per company and risk vector to support triage. This hunting query depends on BitSight data connector (BitsightRiskFindings_CL Parser or Table)
